basic_details.job_title: NIT Arunachal Pradesh Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Adjunct Faculty and Professor Posts
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Technology Arunachal Pradesh
basic_details.post_name: Adjunct Faculty (Guest Faculty) and Professor of Practice
basic_details.short_information: DON'T MISSRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Posts • Technician • RRB29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Vacancies • Nursing Officer13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Openings • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,318 postsKSP Civil Police Constable Online Form 20263,991 Vacancies • Civil Police Constable • KSP03 Jul 20263,991 postsMPSC 2619 Group C Online Form 20262,619 Openings • Group C17 Jul 20262,619 posts

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for specific age limit details for each post. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: First Class in both B.Tech./B.E. and M.Tech./M.E. or equivalent in relevant branch of Engineering, First Class in both B.Tech./B.Sc and M.Tech./M.Sc. or equivalent in respective branch of Engineering or Science or allied branches, First Class in both UG and PG in MBA or equivalent discipline, Ph.D. in the relevant or equivalent discipline (desirable)
qualification.details: Civil Engineering: First Class in both B.Tech./B.E. and M.Tech./M.E. or equivalent in relevant branch of Engineering. Ph.D. desirable. Computer Science & Engineering: First Class in both B.Tech./B.E. and M.Tech./M.E. or equivalent in relevant branch of Engineering. Ph.D. desirable. Electronics & Communication Engineering: First Class in both B.Tech./B.E. and M.Tech./M.E. or equivalent in relevant branch of Engineering. Ph.D. desirable. Electrical Engineering: First Class in both B.Tech./B.E. and M.Tech./M.E. or equivalent in relevant branch of Engineering. Ph.D. desirable. Mechanical Engineering: First Class in both B.Tech./B.E. and M.Tech./M.E. or equivalent in relevant branch of Engineering. Ph.D. desirable. Basic & Applied Science: First Class in both B.Tech./B.Sc and M.Tech./M.Sc. or equivalent in respective branch of Engineering or Science or allied branches. Ph.D. desirable. Management & Humanities: First Class in both UG and PG in MBA or equivalent discipline. Ph.D. desirable.

salary_details.details: Adjunct Faculty (Ph.D. holders): Rs. 60,000/- per month Adjunct Faculty (M.Tech. holders): Rs. 50,000/- per month Professor of Practice: Rs. 2,00,000/- per month or Rs. 6,000/- per day

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NIT Arunachal Pradesh Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIT Arunachal Pradesh to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download NIT Arunachal Pradesh Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Arunachal Pradesh Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the Adjunct Faculty and Professor of Practice posts is 15th July 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for these posts?
faq.answer: The required qualifications include First Class in B.Tech./B.E. and M.Tech./M.E. or equivalent for engineering disciplines, First Class in B.Tech./B.Sc and M.Tech./M.Sc. for science branches, and First Class in UG and PG in MBA for management. A Ph.D. is desirable.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for NIT Arunachal Pradesh Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for Adjunct Faculty and Professor of Practice?
faq.answer: Adjunct Faculty can expect a salary of Rs. 50,000/- to Rs. 60,000/- per month based on their qualification (M.Tech. or Ph.D.). Professor of Practice posts offer a salary of Rs. 2,00,000/- per month or Rs. 6,000/- per day.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available in this recruitment?
faq.answer: A total of 7 vacancies are available for the posts of Adjunct Faculty (Guest Faculty) and Professor of Practice across various departments.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a presentation by the candidates followed by an interview. Candidates need to perform well in both stages to be considered for the positions.

faq.question: Q7. Can candidates from outside Arunachal Pradesh apply?
faq.answer: The notification mentions inviting applications from eligible candidates in Arunachal Pradesh. However, it is advisable to check the detailed eligibility criteria in the official notification for any specific residency requirements.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions of Adjunct Faculty and Professor of Practice are contractual in nature, offering a fixed tenure for the duration of the contract.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page. It is recommended to download and read it thoroughly before applying.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of NIT Arunachal Pradesh?
faq.answer: The official website of the National Institute of Technology Arunachal Pradesh is www.nitap.ac.in. You can visit this site for more information about the institute and its recruitments.
